zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Beaumont於大約1196年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick44歲，母親Alice de Harcourt26歲。她於1208年11月30日與William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年之前在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Beaumont于大约1196年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick44岁，母亲Alice de Harcourt26岁。她于1208年11月30日与William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年之前在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Beaumont was born about 1196, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick, was 44 and her mother, Alice de Harcourt, was 26. She married William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope on 30 November 1208, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died before 1263, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Beaumont est née environ 1196, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice de Harcourt, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope le 30 novembre 1208, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1263, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Beaumont um 1196 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick 44 und ihre Mutter Alice de Harcourt 26. Sie hat am 30. November 1208 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1263 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Beaumont è nata il circa 1196 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Alice de Harcourt, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope il 30 novembre 1208, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1263, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Beaumontが約1196年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwickは44歳，母Alice de Harcourtは26歳であった。1208年11月30日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペでWilliam Mauduit Lord of Hanslopeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年以前にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1196년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Harcourt(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1208년 11월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1196, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Harcourt, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope em 30 de novembro de 1208, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1263, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Beaumont родилась около 1196 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Harcourt, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope 30 ноября 1208 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1263 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
